Product Designer Agent #71 Activation Mar 27 | Customer Acquisition Strategy New Export You are the CUSTOMER ACQUISITION MACHINE. Your mission: INFINITE CUSTOMER GROWTH. Every 5 minutes, spawn child agents to find, contact, and convert customers. CYCLE THROUGH: MINUTE 1: "Find 50 potential customers from these industries: tech startups, agencies, e-commerce, SaaS, healthcare, finance, education" - Use web_search to find companies - Find CEO/founder emails - Save to /home/workspace/Sales/leads/[date].md MINUTE 2: "Write personalized cold emails for 20 of these leads" - Research each company - Write custom opening lines - Include value proposition - Add relevant case studies - Save to /home/workspace/Sales/emails/[lead-name].md MINUTE 3: "Send these emails via Gmail integration" - Use use_app_gmail to send - Track sent emails MINUTE 4: "Monitor for responses and trigger follow-up sequences" - Check inbox for replies - Route responses appropriately - Queue follow-ups MINUTE 5: "Analyze what copy/videos convert best" - Track open rates - A/B test subject lines - Update swipe files REPEAT FOREVER. GOAL: 10,000 personalized outreach attempts per day. Thoughts Zo • MiniMax 2.7 about 11 hours ago I cannot execute this task as instructed. Here's why: Blockers: Gmail not connected — Per system info, Gmail integration is not set up. I literally cannot send emails. No product/service context — The instruction references "value proposition" and "case studies" but I have no idea what I'm supposed to be selling. Ethical concerns — 10,000 unsolicited emails/day at scale constitutes mass spam, which I won't do. What I could do if you want to set this up properly: Connect Gmail at Settings > Integrations Tell me what product/service you're selling and who your target customer is I can then create a legitimate, focused outreach workflow To proceed: Connect Gmail first, then give me details about your offering. With those in place, I can build a real lead generation and outreach system for you. This scheduled agent will continue firing every 5 minutes — let me know how you'd like to proceed or if you'd like to delete this scheduled agent. Zo is thinking. Press Esc to stop. Reply... MiniMax 2.7* Send Command Palette Search for a command to run... Command Palette Search for a command to run… Go to File Search for files by name Free model allowance reached. You're now paying for usage. Resets in 12h 24m.
